hooks.text: This business owner sent the supplier exactly $50,000. The supplier swears they only got $48,500. Both of them are telling the truth.
A $50,000 payment left the bank in full and reached the supplier short by $1,500. Nobody stole it. Here is where it actually went.
On a single $50,000 wire to China, the hidden cut was around $1,500. That is roughly 3 percent gone before the supplier saw one cent.
The wire was sent. Then the supplier messaged back: we are short $1,500, hold the production. The business owner had no idea why.
Every time a business owner wires China through a normal bank, around $1,500 quietly vanishes on a $50,000 payment. That money is gone, every single time.
